title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
